attributes.action: Make Starmer stand down as prime minister
attributes.additional_details: Make Starmer stand down as Prime Minister , Even though his party is Suffering a great loss He will not admit that he’s the reason why, he should stand down and let someone else take charge
attributes.background: Make Starmer stand down as Prime Minister , Even though his party is Suffering a great loss He will not admit that he’s the reason why, he should stand down and let someone else take charge

rejection.details:
We can't accept petitions about appointments, which includes calling for elected representatives or public servants to resign or be removed from office.

If you're concerned about a particular policy or decision that's the responsibility of Government or the House of Commons, you could start a petition about that.
